title: The near death experience of Dr. Mary Helen Hensley
description:
Dr. Mary Helen Hensley explains how her near-death experience happened, and how it has changed her vision of life and death. 
https://anthonychene.com/#about
https://www.instagram.com/anthonychene
https://www.tiktok.com/@anthonychene

Dr. Mary Helen Hensley's website: https://www.maryhelenhensley.com

With many thanks to Jan-Willem van Aalst for the Dutch subtitles
